rules.errorSemantics: Errors are explicit and never imply a side effect was replayed.
rules.idempotency: Write tools use the facade single-writer ledger and an idempotency key.
rules.units: Durations use seconds in generation input and milliseconds in edit segment or annotation fields.

rules.compatibility: N and N-1 are accepted. Unsupported explicit epochs fail before side effects with PLUGIN_TASK_STALE; absent epochs remain compatible for the first transition release.

rules.confirmationBoundary: Pure presentation may change hot. Tool mapping, defaults, validation, approval, payment, or write confirmation are cold contract.
